creator: andrey@bsdnir.info
text:
Created attachment 211571
Update to 19.4

Update port upstream accept base FreeBSD changes.

 * Official upstream now https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/
 * distro: correctly set usr_lib_exec path for FreeBSD distro (40)
 * set_passwords: support for FreeBSD (46) [Igor Galić]
 * fix unlocking method on FreeBSD [Igor Galić]

take manteinership https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=240372#c7

testport: OK (poudriere: 113amd64, 121amd64, 121i386, 13amd64 tested)

obsolete bug #240372
